title: Polestar has been muscled out of the US market
content: Polestar won't be allowed to sell its electric vehicles model year 2027 and beyond in the US after the federal government denied the company's request for authorization under a new rule banning vehicles with software from China. In a press release, the company says the decision to retreat from the U
quote: 极星被挤出美国：政治一张纸，千亿车企说没就没——中美科技战的又一个祭品。

title: Is this solar e-bike a good idea or sophisticated e-waste?
